name: cachy

metadata.name: cachy
metadata.summary: Cachy provides a simple yet effective caching library.

documentation:
# Cachy

```{image} https://travis-ci.org/sdispater/cachy.png
:alt: Cachy Build status
:target: https://travis-ci.org/sdispater/cachy
```

Cachy provides a simple yet effective caching library.

The full documentation is available here: <http://cachy.readthedocs.org>

## Resources

- [Documentation](http://cachy.readthedocs.org)
- [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/sdispater/cachy/issues)

documentation: -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

methods.name: cachy.contracts.repository.Repository.has
documentation:
Determine if an item exists in the cache.

:type key: str

methods.name: cachy.contracts.repository.Repository.put
documentation:
Store an item in the cache.

:param key: The cache key
:type key: str

:param value: The cache value
:type value: mixed

:param minutes: The lifetime in minutes of the cached value
:type minutes: int or datetime

methods.name: cachy.contracts.repository.Repository.add
documentation:
Store an item in the cache if it does not exist.

:type key: str

:param value: The cache value

:type minutes: int or datetime

documentation:
Store an item in the cache indefinitely.

:type minutes: int or datetime

:param callback: The default function
:type callback: callable

:rtype: mixed

documentation:
Get an item from the cache, or store the default value forever.
